PLAINTIFF & COUNSEL PRESENT; DEFT FAILED TO APPEAR. 9:50 AM PLAINTIFF MICHAEL LITTMAN S/E EXH 1 - 3 DAY NOTICE ID & ADMITTED 9:55 AM PLAINTIFF RESTS. JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF FOR POSSESSION AND RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 965 ESMERALDA AVE, #1, SF, CA FOR BACK RENTS & DAMAGES OF $2773.48, FORFEITURE OF LEASE PLUS COSTS. JUDGMENT IS ON CONDITION THAT PLAINTIFF SUBMITS A COPY OF DOCUMENT WHICH CORROBORATES TESTIMONY THE RIGHT OF PLAINTIFF TO FILE COMPLAINT. EXHIBIT WITHDRAWN & RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT JUDGMENT.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LITTMAN, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT COLINDRES, ROSA DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLINDRES, ROSA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 965 ESMERALDA ST, SF, CA $2,773.48 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,773.48, LEASE FORFEITED
